ai_suggestion: For today's lovely weather in Addis Ababa, I recommend styling a breathable cotton t-shirt or light blouse with tailored chinos, topped with a chic lightweight jacket or cardigan to easily adapt to the shifting breeze. Do not forget to bring along a pair of statement sunglasses for those partly cloudy skies and a soft scarf to keep you comfortable in the wind. Have a wonderful day out, and remember to keep those layers close by since the temperature will drop significantly as the evening approaches.
